name: akiyama-children-photo
description: Prompt skill for candid analog children's documentary photo generation.

interface.shortDescription: 生成胶片感儿童纪实摄影提示词
interface.longDescription: A personal Codex plugin for creating prompt packs and art direction for relaxed, analog, child-centered documentary photographs inspired by everyday-life 1980s China references.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $akiyama-children-photo 生成一组自然抓拍的胶片感儿童纪实照片提示词。
